name: McDonald's
deal: App-only Saver Menu from R25 — includes McFlurry, Small Fries, and Quarter Pounder deals updated weekly
howToClaim: Download the McDonald's SA app, browse the Deals tab, and add to cart before ordering

name: Nando's
deal: Fire Points loyalty reward — earn 10 points per R10 spent, redeem for free peri-peri chicken
howToClaim: Register a Nando's card at any store or via the Nando's website. Present card at payment

name: Debonairs Pizza
deal: Buy any large pizza online, get a second medium pizza free using the app
howToClaim: Order via the Debonairs app or website. Deal auto-applies at checkout with qualifying cart

name: Steers
deal: Double Delivery deal — free burger added to qualifying delivery orders over R150 via the app
howToClaim: Order on the Steers app. Add a qualifying burger combo and the free item appears at checkout

name: KFC
deal: Tuesday Treat — buy any 2-piece meal and get a free Streetwise Two every Tuesday
howToClaim: Visit any KFC store on Tuesdays. Show the KFC app coupon at the till to redeem

name: Romans Pizza
deal: Slice of the Action loyalty — earn slices with every order, redeem for a free pizza after 10 slices
howToClaim: Join the Slice of the Action programme via the Romans Pizza website or app. Scan at checkout

name: Burger King
deal: App-exclusive R49 Whopper Meal — includes small fries and a drink, app users only
howToClaim: Download the Burger King SA app. The deal appears in the Offers section — add to cart to activate
